en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains a valid High-Pressure Gas License in the Japan High-Pressure Gas License Applicability Assessment questionnaire.\t
Please upload your High-Pressure Gas License.
Please enter the registration date of your High-Pressure Gas License.
The expiration date will be clearly displayed on the High-pressure Gas License. The license is typically valid depending on the company's classification.
Please enter the expiration date of your High-Pressure Gas License.
